texts.text: Customer information not found.
Profile photo cannot be longer than {0} characters
Beneficiary bank account is invalid or locked.
Your wallet is frozen. Transaction cannot be performed.
Insufficient available balance for this transaction.
Receiving bank account is invalid.
Withdrawal request does not exist or has been processed.
Wallet information not found.
Transaction type code already exists in the system.
Cannot delete transaction type with existing actual transactions.
Required transaction type is not configured in the system.
Bank account not found.
Account number already exists in the system.
Account number is invalid or empty.
Please configure FptAI:ApiKey in appsettings.json
Error calling FPT.AI API (Invalid key or server error)
Invalid image or ID card not recognized.
KYC information not found.
Please upload front image of ID card.
Only JPG, PNG, or WebP images are accepted.
Image must not exceed 10MB.
At least ID number or full name is required.
User ID not found in token.
User ID in token is invalid.
